
---

# 4. `02-structure.qmd`

```markdown
---
title: "Understanding the Structure"
---

## The Core Files

Your template includes:

- `index.qmd`
- `research.qmd`
- `projects.qmd`
- `publications.qmd`
- `cv.qmd`

Each one becomes a page on your website.

---

## How Navigation Works

Open `_quarto.yml`.

You’ll see:

```yaml
navbar:
  left:
    - href: research.qmd
      text: Research
